_notes.purpose: Example pipeline.json. pipeline.json is the source of truth for the input image, prompt, diffusion settings, CPU/GPU flag, DeepFace enabled models, and which perturbation methods are enabled.
_notes.input: Image path. Relative paths are resolved from the folder containing this JSON.
_notes.output_dir: Folder where one normal pipeline run writes original.png, perturbed.png, diffused images, and report.json.
_notes.prompt: The selected diffusion model prompt applied to both original and perturbed images.
_notes.seed: Base seed used by perturbations and diffusion unless overridden.
_notes.diffusion.cpu: true forces CPU. false with device auto uses CUDA when PyTorch can see it.
_notes.diffusion.models: Enable exactly one model block for normal use. If both instruct_pix2pix and flux2_klein are enabled, flux2_klein is selected and instruct_pix2pix is ignored.
_notes.flux2_klein: FLUX.2 Klein options include num_inference_steps, guidance_scale, max_size, height, width, max_sequence_length, text_encoder_out_layers, torch_dtype, cpu_offload, sigmas, and seed.
_notes.deepface.workers: auto or integer. Only used by the full pipeline when diffusion resolves to CUDA; CPU runs stay sequential.
